personas.label: Skeptical operator
personas.motivation: save time and avoid fragile tools
personas.coreObjection: This sounds like setup complexity disguised as automation.
personas.contentLens: Skeptical operator evaluating tiket del evento nel qule è compero cibo e drink

personas.label: Cost-sensitive founder
personas.segment: perosne a cui pioace fare netwokl di livello
personas.coreObjection: Local-first is attractive, but quality and maintenance worry me.
personas.conversionTrigger: specific hardware expectations and realistic limits
personas.contentLens: Cost-sensitive founder evaluating tiket del evento nel qule è compero cibo e drink

personas.label: Creative strategist
personas.segment: i locali ci devono chiamere per fare gli venti nei loro locali anceh capito perche noi priu o meno portio 200 perosne di livello nel locale che fanno netwiking magiano
personas.coreObjection: The content may become generic if the system does not learn taste.
personas.conversionTrigger: memory from feedback and strong examples

personas.label: Agency delivery lead
personas.coreObjection: Approval, revisions, and client-specific voice need to be robust.
personas.conversionTrigger: clear review states and client-ready artifacts
personas.contentLens: Agency delivery lead evaluating tiket del evento nel qule è compero cibo e drink

personas.label: Technical early adopter
personas.motivation: own the stack and customize agents
personas.coreObjection: I need proof that integrations are modular and not locked to a SaaS.
personas.conversionTrigger: repo structure, local commands, and extension points
personas.contentLens: Technical early adopter evaluating tiket del evento nel qule è compero cibo e drink

drafts.title: Post 1: The Room
drafts.body:
Hook: Networking in New York should not feel like a conference lobby.

Body: Out Of Office is built for people who want useful professional connections without losing the social energy of a good night out. The promise is simple: a curated room, interesting people, food and drinks when confirmed for the event, and a setting that makes starting conversations easier.

CTA: Join the community or grab a ticket for the next confirmed event.

Safety note: Confirm event date, venue, ticket inclusions, and link before publishing.

drafts.title: Post 2: Venue Angle
drafts.body:
Hook: A strong event is not just traffic. It is the right room.

Body: For New York venues, Out Of Office can position events around qualified professional attendance, social energy, and food and drink spend. Any attendance number or venue result must be verified before it becomes a public claim.

CTA: Ask about hosting a future Out Of Office night.

Safety note: Do not publish attendance claims unless a human confirms the exact proof.
